mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT no, title, review_count AS reviewCount, avg_rating AS avgRating, cover FROM br_book WHERE title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY review_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT no, title, cover, review_count AS reviewCount, avg_rating AS avgRating, dist1, dist2, dist3, dist4, dist5, pos_count AS posCount, neu_count AS neuCount, neg_count AS negCount FROM br_book WHERE title = #{title} ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT content, rating FROM br_review WHERE book_no = #{bookNo} ORDER BY rating DESC, no
SELECT no, title, review_count AS reviewCount, avg_rating AS avgRating, cover FROM br_book ORDER BY no
mapper.update: UPDATE br_book SET cover = #{cover} WHERE no = #{no}
